overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk along the Del Perro Pier. The character moves along the wooden boardwalk past street lamps, food stalls, and pedestrians, with the illuminated Ferris wheel and Los Santos city skyline visible in the background.

events.description: descending wooden stairs onto the main pier deck
exiting enclosed stairwell onto open pier platform

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs onto the pier boardwalk

entered.detail: weathered wooden stairs with white painted edges leading down to pier
black metal handrails along both sides of the stairs
grey metal coin-operated telescope for viewing the ocean
tall black lamppost with bright white light
white painted wooden bench facing the ocean

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on wooden stairs descending onto the Del Perro Pier at night. Metal railings line the stairs, and a coin telescope viewer stands on the right. The area is illuminated by street lamps, with benches visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pier boardwalk with food vendors

events.description: passing a food stall with a large colorful burger-shaped umbrella
navigating around pedestrians walking along the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier past food stalls and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead on the boardwalk

entered.detail: food vendor stall with a large colorful umbrella shaped like a hamburger
small wooden building with a sloped metal roof on the right side
wall covered with colorful advertisements and posters
A-frame wooden barrier with red and white stripes
distant city buildings with illuminated windows across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open pier boardwalk, passing a distinctive food stall with a burger-shaped umbrella on the right. The Los Santos city skyline becomes visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and small shop buildings line the right side of the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier approach with city skyline view

events.description: passing directly under a bright street lamp casting strong light
ferris wheel with colorful lights comes into view at the pier end

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier toward the end with the city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shirt walking ahead toward the pier end

entered.detail: large illuminated Ferris wheel with changing colored lights at the pier end

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the pier with the city skyline visible across the water on the left. The Ferris wheel comes into view on the right, illuminated with colorful lights. The camera passes under street lamps and coin telescopes as it moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end with amusement park and ferris wheel view

events.description: ferris wheel lights change from pink to blue to green colors
turning right toward the main pier building with string lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier edge admiring the illuminated ferris wheel and city lights

notable_agents.action: couple walking together along the pier railing

entered.detail: large two-story building with 'Pier' signage and illuminated windows
decorative overhead string lights attached to the building
full moon visible in the night sky above the clouds
dark ocean water visible between the wooden planks on the left side

segments.scene_description: The Ferris wheel dominates the view, displaying a colorful light show that reflects on the water. The camera moves along the edge of the pier where the ocean is visible on the left. The main Pier building with decorative string lights appears on the right as the camera turns toward it.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier return path with ticket booth

events.description: approaching the wooden ticket booth structure

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier passing the ticket booth and main building

entered.detail: small wooden kiosk with glass windows and a sloped roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along the return path of the pier, passing a wooden ticket booth in the center. The Ferris wheel remains visible in the distance to the left, while the city skyline stretches across the horizon. The wooden deck shows signs of wear with some debris scattered about.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of the Del Perro Pier toward its illuminated heart and back again under a night sky. It begins by descending wooden stairs lined with metal railings and coin telescopes, moving forward onto the open boardwalk where a burger-shaped food stall and pedestrians appear. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal the distant Los Santos city skyline on the left and a brightly lit, colorful Ferris wheel on the right. The scene then shifts toward the pier's edge, where the Ferris wheel's light show reflects on the ocean water before the camera turns toward a main building adorned with decorative string lights. Finally, the movement transitions to a return path, passing a wooden ticket booth and scattered debris on the worn deck while the skyline and Ferris wheel recede into the distance.
